title: xeranthemum orientale
intro: Xeranthemum orientale, also known as the Oriental Daisy or Yellow Daisy, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Xeranthemum orientale include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Xeranthemum orientale is often used to make herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
